evals.prompt: Can you show me what's inside the avalara-tax app? I want to learn from it.
evals.context: User wants to explore existing app structure for learning
evals.expected_behavior: Should trigger inspect-app skill, extract ZIP, show directory structure, key files, and implementation patterns

evals.prompt: Let me take a look at how the salesforce-gift-cards app is structured
evals.context: User wants to review specific app implementation
evals.expected_behavior: Should trigger inspect-app, locate and extract app, provide detailed inspection

evals.prompt: Extract the shipping app ZIP so I can review the code
evals.context: User requesting extraction for code review
evals.expected_behavior: Should trigger inspect-app with read-only extraction and inspection
